{# vendor_row.html — Single table row for a vendor in the list view. Receives: vendor dict with id, name, health_score, contact_count, last_activity. Called by: list.html loop, views.py vendors_rows endpoint. Depends on: HTMX (hx-get for detail drawer click). #} {{ vendor.name }} {{ vendor.health_score or '-' }} {{ vendor.contact_count or 0 }} {{ vendor.last_activity or '-' }}
